variants.title: Fleetguard AF4810 Cabin Air Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P117049
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF4810 Cabin Air Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P117049
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF4810 panel cabin air filter provides clean air in the cab which means a clean work environment.  Breathing cleaner air can lead to longer and more productive working hours.
specifications: Style: Air Panel, Ventilation, Media: Cellulose, Efficiency 1: ISO 10263-3, Length: 177.8 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: ISO 10263-3, Media Type: Cellulose

variants.title: Donaldson P117049 Air Panel, Ventilation
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P117049 Air Panel, Ventilation is designed to provide reliable performance in air panel, ventilation applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.
specifications: Style: Air Panel, Ventilation, Media: Cellulose, Efficiency 1: ISO 10263-3, Length: 177.8 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: ISO 10263-3, Media Type: Cellulose
